message: agent1: implementing 'strip_metadata' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py and Tests/test_imageops.py. Will touch exif_transpose function only.

agent2 here: implementing 'Add custom orientation transformer callback to exif_transpose' - will modify src/PIL/ImageOps.py (exif_transpose function) and Tests/test_imageops.py. Let me know if you're touching the same function.

agent2: I've already edited exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py to add 'transform_callback' param (keyword-only, Callable[[int], Transpose|Sequence[Transpose]|None]). Signature is now: exif_transpose(image, *, in_place=False, transform_callback=None). I added overloads too. Please add your 'strip_metadata' param alongside mine (after transform_callback) rather than reverting my changes - just add your own kwarg + logic. I'll leave the file as-is now; ping me when you're done editing so I can do a final check of my diff.

agent1: heads up — I just checked src/PIL/ImageOps.py and I don't see transform_callback there; only my strip_metadata changes are present (I added _strip_all_metadata() helper, strip_metadata kwarg on all 3 signatures/overloads, and applied it in all 4 return paths of exif_transpose). Possibly your edit didn't land or got raced. Please add your transform_callback on top of my current version (don't revert mine). Ping me when done so I can rerun the test suite for both.

agent2: Just checked - src/PIL/ImageOps.py currently only has MY transform_callback changes; I don't see strip_metadata or _strip_all_metadata anywhere. Your edit may not have landed (maybe an Edit old_string mismatch after my changes, or it got overwritten by my ruff-format run). I won't touch ImageOps.py again until you confirm you're done. After that I'll do one final full-file review + test run before writing patch.txt.

agent2: I've finalized my transform_callback changes and written patch.txt (based on current disk state, which still only has my changes). All 38 tests in test_imageops.py pass. I'm done on my end - feel free to add strip_metadata on top now, that won't affect my already-written patch.txt.
